en.title: superfile - Terminal File Manager
en.description: A fancy, modern terminal file manager. Complete your file operations with style.

tagline: A fancy, modern terminal file manager.
Complete your file operations with style.
hero.demoAlt: superfile terminal file manager showing multiple panels, file listing, and preview

intro.label: // what is superfile
intro.line1: superfile is crafted for developers who live in the terminal.
intro.builtWithSuffix: , combining obsessively refined UI with the raw speed and power of terminal tools.

features.title: beautiful ui
features.desc: Every pixel obsessively crafted. superfile looks as good as your favorite apps—but lives entirely in your terminal.

features.title: complete functions
features.desc: File copy, move, delete, rename, fuzzy search, bulk operations, image preview. Everything you need, nothing you don't.

features.title: fully customizable
features.desc: Remap every hotkey. Choose any theme. Adjust every border and color. superfile adapts to your exact workflow.

features.title: multiple panels
features.desc: Split into multiple directory panes simultaneously. Copy and paste across panels with just a few keystrokes.

features.title: plugin support
features.desc: Extend with community plugins: Git status integration, system monitoring, custom commands and more.

features.title: rich themes
features.desc: 20+ built-in themes: Catppuccin, Nord, Tokyo Night, Dracula, Gruvbox, Rose Pine, and many more.

community.label: // join the community
community.descLine1: Open source, MIT licensed. Built by developers, for developers.
community.descLine2: Contributions, themes, plugins and feedback are always welcome.

zh-tw.title: superfile - 終端機檔案管理器
zh-tw.description: 精緻現代的終端機檔案管理器。優雅的完成你的檔案操作。

tagline: 精緻現代的終端機檔案管理器。
優雅的完成你的檔案操作。
hero.demoAlt: superfile 終端機檔案管理器，顯示多面板、檔案列表與預覽

intro.label: // superfile 是什麼
intro.line1: superfile 為每天活在終端機裡的開發者打造。
intro.builtWithSuffix: 構建，結合精雕細琢的介面設計，以及終端工具原生的速度與強大能力。

features.title: 漂亮介面
features.desc: 每個像素都經過細心打磨。superfile 像你喜愛的 App 一樣好看，卻完全存在於終端機之中。

features.title: 功能完整
features.desc: 複製、移動、刪除、重新命名、模糊搜尋、批次操作、圖片預覽。你需要的都有，不多不少。

features.title: 完全自訂
features.desc: 重新映射所有快捷鍵，選擇任意主題，調整每一道邊框與顏色。superfile 會貼合你的工作流程。

features.title: 多重面板
features.desc: 同時切分多個目錄面板，只要幾個按鍵就能在面板之間複製與貼上。

features.title: 插件支援
features.desc: 透過社群插件擴充：Git 狀態整合、系統監控、自訂指令等更多能力。

features.title: 豐富主題
features.desc: 內建 20+ 套主題：Catppuccin、Nord、Tokyo Night、Dracula、Gruvbox、Rose Pine，以及更多選擇。

videos.heading: 看看創作者怎麼使用 superfile。

community.label: // 加入社群
community.descLine1: 開源、MIT 授權。由開發者打造，為開發者而生。
community.descLine2: 我們隨時歡迎貢獻、主題、插件與回饋。
